name: Gorilla
tagline: Online experiment builder for behavioral researchers with WebGazer integration
short_impression: Gorilla is a widely-adopted online experiment platform. It offers an graphical user interface experiment builder with WebGazer eye tracking integration as a control component, allowing researchers to conduct remote studies with more complicated experimental designs (e.g. multi-player). The platform is known for its timing precision, task templates, and participant management system.
privacy_notes: Data stored on Gorilla cloud infrastructure.
